authorized_by: Licensed CrossFit affiliate and CrossFit-L2 trainer in good standing (identity withheld by request; on file with the maintainer and confirmable by CrossFit, LLC on request)
permitted_uses: Use of the CrossFit® word mark (with the registered symbol) under the licensee's CrossFit Affiliate and Trainer agreements — including the pack name 'CrossFit Trainer Pack', methodology badges, and card art
Descriptive / nominative reference to content that applies the CrossFit methodology
notes: The CrossFit® word mark is used under the licensee's CrossFit Affiliate and Trainer agreements (a licensed CrossFit affiliate and CF-L2 trainer in good standing). This covers the pack name ('CrossFit Trainer Pack'), badges, and art. It is NOT a claim of sponsorship, endorsement, approval, partnership, or certification by CrossFit, LLC, and the licensee makes no such claim — the pack is an independent work and not an official CrossFit, LLC product. The mark is NOT placed in the catalog's official-partner / authored-by registry. The licensee's name and affiliate are intentionally not published here; standing (CF-L2, good standing) is verifiable by CrossFit, LLC on request.
